zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar於1242年11月11日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，他的父親Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar28歲，母親Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar27歲。他於大約1270年與Lady Marjorie Comyn結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1294年登記服兵役。他去世於1308年10月10日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar于1242年11月11日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，他的父亲Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar28岁，母亲Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar27岁。他于大约1270年与Lady Marjorie Comyn结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1294年登记服兵役。他去世于1308年10月10日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴。

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: IV

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar was born on 11 November 1242, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar, was 28 and his mother, Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar, was 27. He married Lady Marjorie Comyn about 1270. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1294. He died on 10 October 1308, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar est né le 11 novembre 1242, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Marjorie Comyn environ 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1294. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1308, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar am 11. November 1242 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar 28 und seine Mutter Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar 27. Er hat um 1270 Lady Marjorie Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1294 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1308 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar è nato il il 11 novembre 1242 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Marjorie Comyn circa 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1294. Morì il 10 ottobre 1308, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbarが1242年11月11日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbarは28歳，母Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbarは27歳であった。約1270年にLady Marjorie Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1294年に兵役登録をした。彼は1308年10月10日に故郷で65歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar(이)가 1242년 11월 11일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 Lady Marjorie Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1308년 10월 10일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에 묻혔다.

pt.11 November 1242–10 October 1308: 11 de novembro de 1242–10 de outubro de 1308
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1242, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Marjorie Comyn aproximadamente 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1294. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1308, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar родился 11 ноября 1242 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Marjorie Comyn около 1270 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1294 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 10 октября 1308 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.11 November 1242–10 October 1308: 11 de noviembre de 1242–10 de octubre de 1308
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar nació el 11 de noviembre de 1242, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Marjorie Comyn aproximadamente 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1294. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1308, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
